author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Added TensorStorage::on_device() helper that uploads CPU data to the target device before wrapping with from_operation — avoids injecting ToDeviceBackward into the autograd graph. Fixed 11 forward-path instances across: methods.rs (permute_t, split_t), activation.rs (sigmoid, tanh, silu, softplus), fft.rs (fft/ifft/rfft/irfft differentiable), comparison.rs (where_), linalg.rs (batch_transpose), einsum.rs (einsum_differentiable), checkpoint.rs. All 587 tests pass.
